title: Acme Corp - Enterprise Client Record
text: Client: Acme Corp. Industry: E-commerce. Tier: Enterprise. Annual GMV: ₹480 crore. Payment Processor: Razorpay. Contract Start: March 2023. Contract Value: ₹18 lakh per year. Account Manager: Priya Sharma. Primary Use Case: Domestic checkout, UPI, netbanking, credit card. International Payments: No. Monthly transaction volume: 2.1 lakh transactions. Average ticket size: ₹1,900. Current MDR: 1.75% on credit cards, 0% on UPI. Known Issues: Occasional UPI timeout errors during peak sale events. Last Support Ticket: April 2024, resolved in 4 hours. Renewal Due: March 2025. Health Score: 82/100. Notes: Strong candidate for international payment upgrade if they expand to UAE market.

title: Globex Technologies - Enterprise Client Record
text: Client: Globex Technologies. Industry: B2B SaaS. Tier: Enterprise. Annual Recurring Revenue: ₹95 crore. Payment Processor: Stripe. Contract Start: January 2022. Contract Value: ₹22 lakh per year. Account Manager: Rahul Nair. Primary Use Case: International subscriptions, USD billing, recurring payments. International Payments: Yes, primarily US and UK customers. Monthly transaction volume: 45,000 transactions. Average ticket size: $180. Current MDR: 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction (Stripe standard). Known Issues: Disputes around failed Indian card charges due to 2FA requirements. Last Support Ticket: February 2024. Renewal Due: January 2025. Health Score: 74/100. Notes: Exploring switching to Razorpay for domestic leg to reduce cost. At risk if we cannot match Stripe's international coverage.
